contents:
Class Operations
  := operations : sig (fun T => Plus T * Mult T * Zero T * One T)%type.
#[export] Instance SR_plus (s : Operations) : Plus s := fst (fst (fst s.2)).
#[export] Instance SR_mult (s : Operations) : Mult s := snd (fst (fst s.2)).
#[export] Instance SR_zero (s : Operations) : Zero s := snd (fst s.2).
#[export] Instance SR_one (s : Operations) : One s := snd s.2.
destruct A as [TA [[[plA mlA] zA] uA]], B as [TB [[[plB mlB] zB] uB]];simpl in *.

goals.conclusion:
{p : TA = TB &
transport (fun T : Type => (Plus T * Mult T * Zero T * One T)%type) p
  (plA, mlA, zA, uA) =
(plB, mlB, zB, uB)}

{p : TA = TB &
transport (fun T : Type => (Plus T * Mult T * Zero T * One T)%type) p
  (plus, mult, 0, 1) =
(plus, mult, 0, 1)}

transport (fun T : Type => (Plus T * Mult T * Zero T * One T)%type)
  (path_universe f) (plus, mult, 0, 1) =
(plus, mult, 0, 1)

(transport Plus (path_universe f) plus,
transport Mult (path_universe f) mult, transport Zero (path_universe f) 0,
transport One (path_universe f) 1) = (plus, mult, 0, 1)

(transport (fun A0 : Type => A0 -> A0 -> A0) (path_universe f) plus,
transport (fun A0 : Type => A0 -> A0 -> A0) (path_universe f) mult,
transport idmap (path_universe f) 0, transport idmap (path_universe f) 1) =
(plus, mult, 0, 1)

contents: Lemma iso_leibnitz : forall P : Operations -> Type, P A -> P B.

goals.conclusion: forall P : Operations -> Type, P A -> P B
forall P : Operations -> Type, P A -> P B

contents: (* Coq pre 8.8 produces phantom universes, see GitHub Coq/Coq#1033. *)

Class Operations
  := operations : sig (fun T => Plus T * Mult T * Zero T * One T * Negate T)%type.

Definition BuildOperations (T : Type)
  `{Plus T} `{Mult T} `{Zero T} `{One T} `{Negate T}
  : Operations
  := exist _ T (plus,mult,zero,one,negate).
#[export] Instance R_plus (s : Operations) : Plus s := fst (fst (fst (fst s.2))).
#[export] Instance R_mult (s : Operations) : Mult s := snd (fst (fst (fst s.2))).
#[export] Instance R_zero (s : Operations) : Zero s := snd (fst (fst s.2)).
#[export] Instance R_one (s : Operations) : One s := snd (fst s.2).
#[export] Instance R_negate (s : Operations) : Negate s := snd s.2.
(* NB: we need to know they're rings for preserves_negate *)
Context (f : A -> B) `{!IsEquiv f} `{!IsCRing A} `{!IsCRing B} `{!IsSemiRingPreserving f}.

goals.conclusion:
{p : A.1 = B.1 &
transport
  (fun T : Type => (Plus T * Mult T * Zero T * One T * Negate T)%type) p A.2 =
B.2}

contents:
destruct A as [TA [[[[plA mlA] zA] uA] nA]],
  B as [TB [[[[plB mlB] zB] uB] nB]];simpl in *.

goals.conclusion:
{p : TA = TB &
transport
  (fun T : Type => (Plus T * Mult T * Zero T * One T * Negate T)%type) p
  (plA, mlA, zA, uA, nA) =
(plB, mlB, zB, uB, nB)}

{p : TA = TB &
transport
  (fun T : Type => (Plus T * Mult T * Zero T * One T * Negate T)%type) p
  (plus, mult, 0, 1, negate) =
(plus, mult, 0, 1, negate)}

transport
  (fun T : Type => (Plus T * Mult T * Zero T * One T * Negate T)%type)
  (path_universe f) (plus, mult, 0, 1, negate) =
(plus, mult, 0, 1, negate)

(transport Plus (path_universe f) plus,
transport Mult (path_universe f) mult, transport Zero (path_universe f) 0,
transport One (path_universe f) 1, transport Negate (path_universe f) negate) =
(plus, mult, 0, 1, negate)

(transport (fun A0 : Type => A0 -> A0 -> A0) (path_universe f) plus,
transport (fun A0 : Type => A0 -> A0 -> A0) (path_universe f) mult,
transport idmap (path_universe f) 0, transport idmap (path_universe f) 1,
transport (fun A0 : Type => A0 -> A0) (path_universe f) negate) =
(plus, mult, 0, 1, negate)

contents: Lemma iso_leibnitz : forall P : Operations -> Type, P A -> P B.

goals.conclusion: forall P : Operations -> Type, P A -> P B
forall P : Operations -> Type, P A -> P B
